response.original_title: The Last Part of the Mind: Kathy Kolbe and the Hidden Story of Conation
response.overview: A near-death experience.  A radical transformation.  A trailblazer dedicated to revealing a secret that desperately needs to become a universal truth.  Kathy Kolbe has fundamentally changed how people think about human performance.  But, those who know her story know it still needs an ending. And the happiest ending involves as many people as possible understanding the truth about the conative part of the mind.A documentary chronicling the journey Kathy took to develop the Kolbe Theory and empower millions of people to find the freedom to be themselves.
response.title: The Last Part of the Mind: Kathy Kolbe and the Hidden Story of Conation
